name: xCluster Replication & Disaster Recovery
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-xcluster.sh && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → xcluster-demo   (guided xCluster demo)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → ysql-source      (YSQL shell → source cluster)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → ysql-target      (YSQL shell → target cluster)"'
